news.title: SpaceX's Starship delays risk NASA moon landing timeline: watchdog
news.summary: SpaceX's Starship has accumulated at least two years of development delays since NASA picked the rocket as an astronaut moon lander in 2021, and is expected to require more time to clear remaining hurdles before landing on the moon.

news.title: Tech Weekly: Meta lets in rivals, age-checking tech matures
news.summary: Meta's new policy allows rival platforms to integrate with its services, while age-verification technologies continue to evolve amid global online safety regulations.

news.title: New Audible Feature, Smartphones in Space and More | Tech Today
news.summary: CNET covers the latest tech trends for March 2026, including Audible's new 'Read and Listen' feature and the introduction of modern smartphones on NASA missions.

news.title: China ramps up tech race with US, sets lower target for growth
news.summary: At its annual parliament meeting, China vowed to deepen investment in high-tech industries and scientific innovation while setting a reduced growth target for this year.

news.title: How tech is screening underage users amid wave of online safety laws
news.summary: Governments worldwide are ramping up efforts to keep minors off social networks, with identity-verification companies testing various scenarios to prevent underage access.

news.title: Nvidia halts China-bound H200 output, FT reports
news.summary: Nvidia has stopped production of its second-most advanced artificial intelligence chips, known as H200 chips, intended for the Chinese market.

news.title: From Times Square to Silicon Valley, Nuwa Agricultural Technology Unveils AI-Powered Livestock Robot
news.summary: Nuwa Agricultural Technology unveils an AI-powered livestock robot, representing the latest advancement in agricultural automation technology.

news.title: China vows to achieve greater sci-tech self-reliance and strength
news.summary: China will move faster to achieve greater self-reliance and strength in science and technology, according to the government work report.
